generated_oml:
instance BIMModelingTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tools for device configuration"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortService, HealthEffectManagementService, SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) for automated transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenDeploymentService
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure in the AECO domain, exemplified by a Living Lab case study, serving as the physical counterpart for the digital twin"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, OccupancySensor, LightingController, HVACValve
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor collecting operational data from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor collecting operational data from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor collecting operational data from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting controller executing commands from digital twin to adjust lighting levels"
]

instance HVACValve : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC valve executing commands from digital twin to adjust climate control"
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model containing geometric, spatial, and functional building data, enriched with sensor and actuator configurations for Building Control Systems (BCS)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTools, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, AdjustHVACAction
]

instance VisualComfortService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight, AdjustLightingAction
]

instance HealthEffectManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for non-visual health effect management"
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectInsight, AdjustAirQualityAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building systems using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building systems for predictive analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance ModelDrivenDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven deployment process starting from validated BIM models using model-to-model and model-to-text transformations to generate runtime artifacts; evolution supported via standardized extension points for adding new services without full redeployment"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDeploymentInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status monitoring of building systems"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization providing actionable insights to Facility Managers"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort adjustments"
]

instance HealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for health effect management"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization for facility management"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for building system analysis"
]

instance ModelDeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime artifacts generated from BIM models via model transformations"
]

instance AdjustHVACAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to adjust HVAC valve positions for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to adjust lighting levels for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustAirQualityAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to adjust air quality parameters for health effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModularServiceArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular service-oriented architecture with standardized extension points for integrating multiple independent services (e.g., lighting control, energy optimization) that can be deployed centrally or distributed based on system requirements"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC commands) transmitted through Ditto to actuators in the Building Control System (BCS), enabling bidirectional communication for operational adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data updates and control command execution, as specified by Eclipse Hono and Ditto for low-latency data exchange."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central DT Framework integrating BIM, Hono, Ditto, and Unreal Engine components, with roles for Building Control Engineers (modeling), Facility Managers (monitoring), and DT Engineers (service extension), enabling modular, service-oriented operations."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from design through construction to operation and refurbishment, with the digital twin primarily focused on the operational phase (as operated) using BIM models enriched with runtime data."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess synchronization accuracy; semantic drift prevention through continuous synchronization techniques to maintain alignment between digital and physical models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono (supporting MQTT, AMQP, HTTP protocols) for sensor data ingestion and Ditto for digital twin management, enabling bidirectional communication with standardized IoT and digital twin protocols."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems including BIM tools, sensor networks, AI platforms for reinforcement learning (e.g., BOREALIS), and stakeholder collaboration frameworks via standardized extension points."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC), Eclipse Hono/Ditto IoT protocols (MQTT, AMQP), and standardized extension points for modular service integration to ensure interoperability across AECO domain."
]
